lagrange_second(a, b, i, j) = neg_dot_outer(a, b, i, j) + square_outer(b, a, i, j)
proof: function(x0: Nat -> Real, x1: Nat -> Real, x2: Nat, x3: Nat) { neg_dot_outer(x0, x1, x2, x3) + square_outer(x1, x0, x2, x3) = lagrange_second(x0, x1, x2, x3) }(a, b, i, j)

goal: add_fn_2(neg_dot_outer(a, b), square_outer(b, a), i, j) = neg_dot_outer(a, b, i, j) + square_outer(b, a, i, j)
proof: function(x0: (Nat, Nat) -> Real, x1: (Nat, Nat) -> Real, x2: Nat, x3: Nat) { add_fn_2(x0, x1, x2, x3) = x0(x2, x3) + x1(x2, x3) }(neg_dot_outer(a, b), square_outer(b, a), i, j)

goal: lagrange_second(a, b, i, j) = add_fn_2(neg_dot_outer(a, b), square_outer(b, a), i, j)
lagrange_second(a, b) = add_fn_2(neg_dot_outer(a, b), square_outer(b, a))
rectangular_sum(lagrange_second(a, b), n, n) = rectangular_sum(add_fn_2(neg_dot_outer(a, b), square_outer(b, a)), n, n)
rectangular_sum(add_fn_2(neg_dot_outer(a, b), square_outer(b, a)), n, n) = rectangular_sum(neg_dot_outer(a, b), n, n) + rectangular_sum(square_outer(b, a), n, n)
rectangular_sum(square_outer(b, a), n, n) = finite_square_sum(b, n) * finite_square_sum(a, n)
finite_square_sum(b, n) * finite_square_sum(a, n) = finite_square_sum(a, n) * finite_square_sum(b, n)
proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(finite_square_sum(b, n), finite_square_sum(a, n))

goal: rectangular_sum(dot_outer(a, b), n, n) = finite_dot(a, b, n) * finite_dot(a, b, n)
rectangular_sum(neg_dot_outer(a, b), n, n) = -(finite_dot(a, b, n) * finite_dot(a, b, n))
-(finite_dot(a, b, n) * finite_dot(a, b, n)) + finite_square_sum(a, n) * finite_square_sum(b, n) = finite_square_sum(a, n) * finite_square_sum(b, n) + -(finite_dot(a, b, n) * finite_dot(a, b, n))
proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }(finite_square_sum(a, n) * finite_square_sum(b, n), -(finite_dot(a, b, n) * finite_dot(a, b, n)))

goal: lagrange_pair(a, b, i, j) = lagrange_first(a, b, i, j) + lagrange_second(a, b, i, j)
proof: function(x0: Nat -> Real, x1: Nat -> Real, x2: Nat, x3: Nat) { lagrange_first(x0, x1, x2, x3) + lagrange_second(x0, x1, x2, x3) = lagrange_pair(x0, x1, x2, x3) }(a, b, i, j)

goal: add_fn_2(lagrange_first(a, b), lagrange_second(a, b), i, j) = lagrange_first(a, b, i, j) + lagrange_second(a, b, i, j)
proof: function(x0: (Nat, Nat) -> Real, x1: (Nat, Nat) -> Real, x2: Nat, x3: Nat) { add_fn_2(x0, x1, x2, x3) = x0(x2, x3) + x1(x2, x3) }(lagrange_first(a, b), lagrange_second(a, b), i, j)

goal: lagrange_pair(a, b, i, j) = add_fn_2(lagrange_first(a, b), lagrange_second(a, b), i, j)
lagrange_pair(a, b) = add_fn_2(lagrange_first(a, b), lagrange_second(a, b))
rectangular_sum(lagrange_pair(a, b), n, n) = rectangular_sum(add_fn_2(lagrange_first(a, b), lagrange_second(a, b)), n, n)
neg_dot_outer(a, b, i, j) = -dot_outer(a, b, i, j)
proof: function(x0: Nat -> Real, x1: Nat -> Real, x2: Nat, x3: Nat) { -dot_outer(x0, x1, x2, x3) = neg_dot_outer(x0, x1, x2, x3) }(a, b, i, j)

goal: lagrange_first(a, b, i, j) = square_outer(a, b, i, j) + neg_dot_outer(a, b, i, j)
proof: function(x0: Nat -> Real, x1: Nat -> Real, x2: Nat, x3: Nat) { square_outer(x0, x1, x2, x3) + neg_dot_outer(x0, x1, x2, x3) = lagrange_first(x0, x1, x2, x3) }(a, b, i, j)

goal: lagrange_second(a, b, i, j) = neg_dot_outer(a, b, i, j) + square_outer(b, a, i, j)
proof: function(x0: Nat -> Real, x1: Nat -> Real, x2: Nat, x3: Nat) { neg_dot_outer(x0, x1, x2, x3) + square_outer(x1, x0, x2, x3) = lagrange_second(x0, x1, x2, x3) }(a, b, i, j)

goal: lagrange_pair(a, b, i, j) = lagrange_first(a, b, i, j) + lagrange_second(a, b, i, j)
proof: function(x0: Nat -> Real, x1: Nat -> Real, x2: Nat, x3: Nat) { lagrange_first(x0, x1, x2, x3) + lagrange_second(x0, x1, x2, x3) = lagrange_pair(x0, x1, x2, x3) }(a, b, i, j)

goal: lagrange_expanded(a, b, i, j) = square_outer(a, b, i, j) + -dot_outer(a, b, i, j) + (-dot_outer(a, b, i, j) + square_outer(b, a, i, j))
proof: function(x0: Nat -> Real, x1: Nat -> Real, x2: Nat, x3: Nat) { square_outer(x0, x1, x2, x3) + -dot_outer(x0, x1, x2, x3) + (-dot_outer(x0, x1, x2, x3) + square_outer(x1, x0, x2, x3)) = lagrange_expanded(x0, x1, x2, x3) }(a, b, i, j)

goal: lagrange_square(a, b, i, j) = lagrange_pair(a, b, i, j)
rectangular_sum(lagrange_square(a, b), n, n) = rectangular_sum(lagrange_pair(a, b), n, n)

proof: function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0.min(x1) = x1 = x0 >= x1 }[Real](Real.one_half, 0)
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 < x1 or x1.min(x0) = x0 }[Real](0, Real.one_half)

goal: Real.one_half * (x + x) = Real.one_half * x + Real.one_half * x
proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 * x1 + x0 * x2 = x0 * (x1 + x2) }(Real.one_half, x, x)

goal: Real.one_half * x + Real.one_half * x = (Real.one_half + Real.one_half) * x
proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 * x1 + x2 * x1 = (x0 + x2) * x1 }(Real.one_half, x, Real.one_half)
function(x0: Real) { 1 * x0 = x0 }(x)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 >= x1 = x1 <= x0 }[Real](a + -b, 0)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not x0 <= x1 or x2 + x0 <= x2 + x1 }(0, a + -b, b)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }(a, -b)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }(b, -b, a)
function(x0: Real) { x0 + -x0 = 0 }(b)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 - x1 != 0 or x0 = x1 }(0 + a, a)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 + x1 - x1 = x0 }(0, a)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 <= x1 = x0 <= x1 }(b + 0, b + (a + -b))
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 <= x1 = x0 <= x1 }(b, a)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }(b, 0)
function(x0: Real) { 0 + x0 = x0 }(b)

goal: rectangular_sum(lagrange_square(a, b), n, n) = gap + gap
finite_dot(a, b, n) * finite_dot(a, b, n) <= finite_square_sum(a, n) * finite_square_sum(b, n)
